# **Welcome to Code-101-Problems-Logistics-SCM!** 

## **Introduction**

**Hello!** Welcome to our comprehensive repository for **101 logistics and supply chain optimization problems** with multi-tier Jupyter notebook solutions! 

This repository contains:
- **101 real-world problems** from port operations to supply chain management
- **Multi-tier solutions** from mathematical optimization to AI/ML approaches
- **Educational notebooks** with step-by-step explanations and visualizations
- **Video tutorials** complementing each problem

## **Quick Start Guide**

### **1. Explore the Repository**
- **README.md** - Complete overview and getting started
- **Part I** - Port & Container Terminal problems (1-46)
- **Part II** - End-to-End Supply Chain problems (47-101)

### **2. Try Your First Problem**
```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/yildiztu/Code-101-Problems-Logistics-SCM.git

# Navigate to first problem
cd "Part I - The Port & Container Terminal (Problems 1-46)/01. The Single Crane Lift Sequencing Problem/"

# Open and run Tier-1 notebook
jupyter notebook "P1-Tier-1.ipynb"
```

### **3. Watch Video Tutorials**
- **[Part I Course](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6O8rFz-5oZq3HSNoYg_nruGbDq1lUNfu)** - Port operations
- **[Part II Course](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6O8rFz-5oZrSfjIOvYVg8fLeajqjNn-z)** - Supply chain management
- **[YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@IntelliBoost)** - All tutorials

## **How to Contribute**

### **Good First Issues**
- **Bug Reports** - Found an error? Let us know!
- **Documentation** - Help improve explanations
- **Translations** - Make content accessible globally
- **Ideas** - Suggest new problems or approaches

### **Technical Contributions**
- **New Algorithms** - Implement different solution methods
- **Visualizations** - Create better charts and graphs
- **Performance** - Optimize existing code
- **Testing** - Add comprehensive test suites

### **Contribution Badges**
- **First Timer** - Your first contribution
- **Algorithm Expert** - 5+ algorithm implementations
- **Documentation Hero** - Major documentation improvements
- **Global Contributor** - Translation support

## **Community Guidelines**

### **Be Respectful**
- Welcome newcomers and help them learn
- Provide constructive feedback
- Be patient with questions

### **Quality Standards**
- Follow existing code style and structure
- Add clear comments and documentation
- Test your contributions thoroughly

### **Communication**
- Use clear, descriptive issue titles
- Provide context and examples
- Tag relevant maintainers

## **Our Goals**

### **Community Targets**
- **100+ Stars** - Show project value
- **50+ Forks** - Encourage customization
- **Active Discussions** - Build community
- **Global Contributors** - Worldwide participation

### **Educational Impact**
- **Student Success** - Help learners understand optimization
- **Research Support** - Provide benchmark problems
- **Industry Application** - Bridge theory and practice
- **Knowledge Sharing** - Create open educational resources

Please comment below with:
- **Your Background** - Student, researcher, practitioner?
- **Interests** - Which problems or topics interest you most?
